raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.3,"R1.4":0.7,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.4","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"rationale":{"R1.1":"The artifact's core contribution — SelectiveQuad's decomposition of truncation vs. conditioning uncertainty plus the abstention mechanism — must be reconstructed to evaluate the work at all; active regardless of feedback type.","R1.2":"The argument chain (standard G-K estimator fails under cancellation → combined estimator disambiguates → NaN-tagging handles residual cases) contains evaluable inferential steps and potential gaps worth checking.","R1.4":"An open 'what do you think?' on a research abstract plausibly solicits novelty judgment: interval-arithmetic error bounding is an established technique, and whether SelectiveQuad's combination constitutes a genuine delta is contestable.","R1.6":"The abstract contains conspicuous anaphoric repetition ('The standard error estimator…' three consecutive sentences; 'We report…' three consecutive sentences) that is a natural comment target if writing quality is what is being solicited."},"clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Are you asking primarily for an assessment of the scientific contribution and novelty of SelectiveQuad, or for feedback on the writing quality and prose style of this abstract?"}

rationale.R1.1: The artifact's core contribution — SelectiveQuad's decomposition of truncation vs. conditioning uncertainty plus the abstention mechanism — must be reconstructed to evaluate the work at all; active regardless of feedback type.
rationale.R1.2: The argument chain (standard G-K estimator fails under cancellation → combined estimator disambiguates → NaN-tagging handles residual cases) contains evaluable inferential steps and potential gaps worth checking.
rationale.R1.4: An open 'what do you think?' on a research abstract plausibly solicits novelty judgment: interval-arithmetic error bounding is an established technique, and whether SelectiveQuad's combination constitutes a genuine delta is contestable.
rationale.R1.6: The abstract contains conspicuous anaphoric repetition ('The standard error estimator…' three consecutive sentences; 'We report…' three consecutive sentences) that is a natural comment target if writing quality is what is being solicited.

parsed.clarification_question: Are you asking primarily for an assessment of the scientific contribution and novelty of SelectiveQuad, or for feedback on the writing quality and prose style of this abstract?
